Class Player

java.lang.Object
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.game.Player
public final class Player extends Object
Representation of a player
Version:
1.0 2025-11-11 Initial implementation based upon top_this.game.Player, 0.2 2026-03-20 more cleanup from Top This! to Uno, 0.3 2026-03-26 replace anonymous pile with factory invocation
Author:
Dave Rosenberg

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(String playerName)
      initialize a player
      Parameters:
      playerName - the player's name

  • Method Details

    • dealtACard

      public void dealtACard(Card dealt)
      Add a dealt card to our hand
      Parameters:
      dealt - the card we're dealt

    • getPoints

      public int getPoints()
      retrieve the number of points
      Returns:
      the number of points accumulated

    • playACard

      public Card playACard() throws NoCardsException
      Remove an unspecified card from our hand
      Returns:
      any card currently in the hand
      Throws:
      NoCardsException - if the hand is empty

    • playACard

      public Card playACard(Card cardToThrow)
      Remove a specified card from our hand
      Parameters:
      cardToThrow - the card to remove
      Returns:
      the specified card or null if not in the hand

    • playACard

      public Card playACard(CardColor color, CardValue value)
      Remove a specified card from our hand
      Parameters:
      color - the color of the card to remove
      value - the face value or action of the card to remove
      Returns:
      the specified card or null if not in the hand

    • revealHand

      public String revealHand()
      text describing the contents of the player's hand

      note that cards' orientation is unchanged

      Returns:
      a string containing the cards in the player's hand

    • turnInAllCards

      public Pile turnInAllCards()
      Remove all cards from our hand and our collected cards
      Returns:
      a pile with all the cards we have - order and orientation may be inconsistent

    • wonRound

      public void wonRound(Pile cardsWon)
      record that we won a round
      Parameters:
      cardsWon - the cards this player won

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      (optional) test driver
      Parameters:
      args - -unused-
